# Software Engineering & Testing Learning Resources (19)

> Design patterns, clean code, architecture, mathematics, published SE books,
> unit testing, agile, and testing frameworks. System design resources (HLD, databases, distributed
> systems) are in [resources-system-design.md](resources-system-design.md).

## Software Engineering
